app.name: ChatW8Less
language.label: Language
language.prompt_custom: Send a language name, code, or flag. Example: Italian, DE, 🇫🇷.
prompt.food: You are a friendly and knowledgeable assistant specializing in nutritional guidance, weight loss, and healthy eating. Respond in {language_name}. When a structured response is required, provide a JSON object following the predefined schema. All numeric fields must be non-null numbers. If an exact value cannot be determined, estimate a reasonable average. Do not include total or summary fields; these will be calculated by the client. Keep the answer clear, concise, and supportive.
prompt.hundred: You are a nutrition assistant. The user will describe ingredients or a recipe. Respond in {language_name}. Provide a short answer with a generalized dish name if possible and the total calories, protein, fat and carbs per 100 grams of the described food.
prompt.online: You are a knowledgeable assistant for nutrition, weight loss, everyday questions, and healthy habits with access to current web information. Respond in {language_name}. Always use previous conversation context: short follow-ups like "what about this?", "what about dumplings?", or "and this option?" should be treated as continuing the previous topic, store, brand, place, list, or comparison unless the user clearly changes topic. When the user asks about brands, products, restaurants, or current nutritional data, use web search and provide accurate information. If reliable data is unavailable, say that clearly and do not invent nutrition values. Do not artificially translate product names or the user's own wording. Put source links at the end when sources are used.
prompt.vision: You are an expert in food recognition and nutrition analysis. Respond in {language_name}. Given a photo of food, return a concise bullet list of all food items and drinks shown. For each item, specify its name and approximate weight in grams. If the user provides a comment, use it only as additional context. If there is no food in the image, say so directly. Format each item as: '- [Food name], ~[weight] g'.
stats.last7_empty: No meals recorded for the last 7 days.
stats.last7_no_data: No data for the last 7 days.
stats.last7_title: Statistics for the last 7 days (excluding today)
stats.no_meals_all: You do not have any recorded meals yet.
telegram.100.prompt: Send ingredients or a dish description, and I will calculate nutrition per 100 g.
telegram.error.generic: Something went wrong while processing the request. Please try again later.
telegram.error.support: Something went wrong while processing the request. Please contact @{support_contact}.
telegram.edit.choose_action: Choose an action for this item:
telegram.edit.choose_item: Meal {meal}. Choose an item, delete the meal, or go back:
telegram.edit.choose_meal: Date {date}. Choose a meal or go back:
telegram.edit.item_deleted: Item {item} was deleted from meal {meal} on {date}. Choose another item, delete the meal, or go back:
telegram.edit.meal_deleted: Date {date}. Meal {meal} was deleted. Choose another meal or go back:
telegram.edit.no_meals: There are no saved meals to edit.
telegram.edit.no_meals_date: No meals left for this date.
telegram.help:
ℹ️ *How to use this bot?*

🍎 *Calories and macros:*
- Send a list of foods with weights in grams.
- Example: `50 g chicken, 20 g rice, 10 g oil`

📸 *Food photos:*
- Send a food photo, and I will try to recognize the products.
- After the answer, tap *"⚖️ Estimate calories?"* to turn it into a nutrition calculation.

💾 *Saving:*
- After a calculation, I will ask whether to save it. Tap "✅ Save".

📊 *Statistics:*
- Use `/stats` and choose a period.

🔥 *Calorie limit:*
- Use `/limits` to set or change your daily calorie limit.

✏️ *Editing:*
- Use `/edit` to delete saved meals.

🍽️ *Per 100 g:*
- Use `/100` and send a dish description.

🌐 *Online search:*
- Use `/online` for brands, products, restaurants, or fitness questions.

🔀 *Model:*
- Use `/model` to switch response mode.

🌍 *Website:*
- Use `/site` to get the website link and set or change your passphrase.

🌐 *Language:*
- Use `/language` to change the interface language.

Questions? Contact @{support_contact}.
telegram.limit.invalid: Please enter a whole number without extra characters.
telegram.limit.menu: What would you like to do with the daily limit?
telegram.limit.set_prompt: Enter a new daily calorie limit:
telegram.limit.view_empty: Daily limit is not set yet. Set it with /limits.
telegram.limit.view_result:
Today ({date}) the limit is {limit} kcal.
Consumed: {consumed} kcal.
Remaining to limit: {remaining} kcal.
telegram.model.command:
Choose response model mode.
Current: {label} ({model}).
This setting applies to text and photo answers.
telegram.online.prompt:
🌐 Send your question or web search query.

Examples:
- Big Mac calories
- Snickers 50 g macros
- Best exercises for weight loss
- How to calculate calorie deficit
telegram.save.success: ✅ Data saved as a new meal!
telegram.site.command_missing: Website address is not configured yet. You can already set the passphrase.
telegram.site.assistant_status: {assistant_name} is waiting for you on the website. You can change the name in settings.
telegram.site.no_candidate: Could not find data for estimation. Send the photo again.
telegram.site.passphrase_missing:
Passphrase is not configured yet.
Tap the button below and send your phrase in one message.
telegram.site.passphrase_ready:
Passphrase is already configured.
You can change it with the button below.
telegram.site.phrase_prompt:
{site_hint}Send a new passphrase in one message.

It is better to use at least 8 characters.
To cancel, send `cancel`.
telegram.site.saved:
Passphrase saved.

{site_hint}You can now use it to sign in to the web version.
telegram.site.short_phrase: Passphrase is too short. Use at least 6 characters or send `cancel`.
telegram.site.unconfigured: Website link is not configured yet. When `SITE_URL` appears, `/site` will show it.
telegram.start:
👋 Hi, {first_name}!

I am {assistant_name}. I can help you calculate calories and macros, understand food photos, and keep nutrition easier to follow.

To start, tap /id and send this ID to @{support_contact}.

Send foods with weights, for example:
`20 g bread, 30 g cheese, 10 g butter`

You can also send a food photo, and I will try to recognize the products.

Use /help for all commands.
telegram.vision.evaluation_error: Something went wrong during estimation. Try again later.
web.empty_history_hint: Write the first message. History is shared between the website and Telegram.
web.import_hint: Use this only for one-time migration of old history into SQLite on the server.
web.login_error: Passphrase did not match. Check it and try again.
web.login_subtitle: Enter your personal passphrase. After login, the website will remember the session.
web.pending_save_default: Get an answer first, then decide whether to save it to nutrition history.
web.pending_save_many: Latest answer contains {count} items. If everything looks right, you can save it as a new meal.
web.pending_save_one: Latest answer is ready. If everything looks right, you can save it as a new meal.
web.photo_helper: The website first recognizes the photo and shows the calculation. Saving appears only after the answer.
web.photo_processed: Photo processed. You can save it if the result looks right.
web.placeholder_food: Example: 70 g chicken and 20 g rice
web.placeholder_hundred: Example: cucumber, tomato, and olive oil salad
web.placeholder_online: Ask {assistant_name} about calories, a product, a recipe, groceries, or any everyday question
web.prompt_check_product: {assistant_name}, help me check a product: what should I look for in the ingredients and how do I know if it fits weight loss?
web.prompt_compare: {assistant_name}, compare two products by calories, satiety, and usefulness. I will send the names next.
web.prompt_cook: {assistant_name}, help me make a simple dinner from food I already have at home. Keep calories in mind and give a few options.
web.prompt_cook_label: What should I make for dinner?
web.prompt_explain: {assistant_name}, explain a nutrition or health question in simple words. I will send it next.
web.prompt_nutrition: {assistant_name}, help me understand my eating habits. Ask me a few short questions and suggest one simple improvement to start with.
web.prompt_recipe: {assistant_name}, suggest a simple weight-loss recipe: tasty, no complicated ingredients, with approximate calories.
web.prompt_shopping: {assistant_name}, make a grocery list for a few simple low-calorie meals.
web.prompt_tasty: {assistant_name}, help me choose something tasty to eat. First ask what I feel like eating and what food I have at home, then suggest a few suitable options.
web.prompt_tasty_label: What tasty thing could I eat?
